description: Build packages/observability - Full observability stack with distributed tracing, structured logging, metrics, health checks, circuit breaker, retry/backoff, bulkhead, timeout management, error tracking, profiling, SLO tracking, and chaos engineering
steps: Create packages/observability/src/types.ts with all type definitions: TraceContext, Span, SpanKind, SpanStatus, LogEntry, LogLevel, MetricType, Counter, Gauge, Histogram, Summary, HealthStatus, HealthCheck, CircuitState, CircuitBreakerConfig, RetryConfig, BackoffStrategy, BulkheadConfig, TimeoutConfig, ErrorGroup, ErrorContext, ProfileSample, SLODefinition, SLOStatus, BurnRate, ChaosExperiment, FaultType, CanaryMetrics, CanaryVerdict

Create packages/observability/src/core/distributed-tracer.ts - Trace ID generation (128-bit hex), span creation/finishing, parent-child span trees, context propagation (baggage items), span timing, span attributes, trace sampling (head-based, tail-based), trace export. ~450 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/structured-logger.ts - JSON structured logging, log levels (trace/debug/info/warn/error/fatal), context enrichment (correlation IDs, request IDs, user IDs), child loggers, log sampling, log redaction (PII filtering), ring buffer for recent logs. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/metrics-collector.ts - Counter (monotonic increment), Gauge (set/inc/dec), Histogram (observe with configurable buckets, percentile calculation), Summary (quantiles with sliding window), labels/dimensions, metric export format, metric aggregation. ~500 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/health-checker.ts - Health check registry, liveness probe (process alive), readiness probe (dependencies ready), startup probe (initialization complete), dependency health (DB, cache, external services), aggregated health status, graceful degradation. ~350 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/circuit-breaker.ts - Circuit breaker pattern: closed (normal), open (failing fast), half-open (testing recovery). Failure counting, success threshold for recovery, timeout for half-open transition, per-operation breakers, event emission, metrics integration. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/retry-handler.ts - Retry with exponential backoff, jitter (full, equal, decorrelated), max attempts, retry conditions (which errors to retry), circuit breaker integration, retry budgets, retry metrics, deadline awareness. ~350 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/bulkhead.ts - Bulkhead pattern: concurrent request limiting per resource, queue management (bounded queue with timeout), resource isolation, semaphore-based implementation, priority queuing, shed load on overflow. ~350 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/timeout-manager.ts - Cascading timeout management: deadline propagation across service calls, remaining budget calculation, timeout hierarchy, adaptive timeouts (based on p99 latency), timeout events, graceful cancellation. ~300 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/error-tracker.ts - Error capture with stack trace, error deduplication (fingerprinting by message + stack), error grouping, error context (breadcrumbs, user actions), error rate tracking, alert thresholds, error resolution tracking. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/performance-profiler.ts - CPU profiling (function call timing), memory tracking (heap snapshots, allocation tracking), event loop lag measurement, async operation tracking, flame graph data generation, hot path detection. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/slo-tracker.ts - SLO definition (availability, latency, error rate targets), error budget calculation, burn rate alerts (fast burn, slow burn), SLO status dashboard data, time-window tracking (rolling 30d), multi-window alerting. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/chaos-engineering.ts - Fault injection (errors, exceptions), latency injection (fixed, random, spike), kill switch (graceful shutdown simulation), network partition simulation, resource exhaustion simulation, experiment scheduling, blast radius control. ~400 lines

Create packages/observability/src/core/canary-analyzer.ts - Canary vs baseline metric comparison, statistical significance testing (chi-squared, Mann-Whitney U simplified), automated verdict (pass/fail/inconclusive), metric collection windows, rollback triggers. ~400 lines
Update scripts/test.js to add 'social-graph', 'gaming', 'ml-pipeline', 'observability' to requiredPackages array (shared-ui already exists)
acceptance_criteria: packages/observability/src/index.ts exists and exports all public APIs
DistributedTracer generates trace IDs and builds span trees with timing
MetricsCollector implements counter, gauge, histogram with bucket percentiles
CircuitBreaker transitions between closed/open/half-open states correctly
RetryHandler implements exponential backoff with jitter variations
SLOTracker computes error budgets and burn rate alerts
ChaosEngineering supports fault injection and latency injection
scripts/test.js validates all 27 packages (22 existing + 5 new: social-graph, gaming, ml-pipeline, observability + shared-ui already counted)
NODE_OPTIONS='' node scripts/test.js passes with all 26 packages
All files are 300-500 lines with real implementations
findings: All 15 files created successfully. Test passes with 26 packages. Total 5702 lines of code for the observability package. All core files in 300-520 line range with real algorithm implementations including Mann-Whitney U test, exponential backoff with jitter, sliding window circuit breaker, W3C traceparent propagation, Prometheus exposition format, CKMS-inspired quantile tracking, and Box-Muller transform for normal distribution.
